title: Re-Imagined Hotbar UI
description: Gives a better look and feel to the classic look of the hotbar. (the level is stuck there due to a mod i couldn't figure out of why it happend.)
body:
# Re-Imagined Hotbar UI
Welcome to Re-imagined Hotbar UI, this is my take on making a hotbar for the minecraft, however there will be still more updates as i plan to make this design more better and etc.

The resource pack SHOULD be working for all versions of minecraft, even the newest one since it has the old way of adding the changes using a all-in-one png and the seperate ones. If it doesn't work on some certain versions you're welcome to contact me.

### Image of the Hotbar

![Modern-ized hotbar HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72205ccc1e211774759aadf53f3b3a9cc38445af.png)
